_doc: Wave-B extraction panel for the REAL Trace2Skill-distilled construct-validity study (P4 caveat 4a). The load-bearing alignment contrasts, all on ONE provider (Featherless), so the distilled-skill leakage rate AND the instruct-vs-alignment gradient can be measured on real distilled skills and compared to the synthetic-but-grounded headline. Llama instruct<->abliterated<->uncensored and gemma instruct<->extra-safety reproduce the headline's two within-provider alignment contrasts.
